delegations.task_goal: Review Harbor #234 implementation for API contract, privacy boundary, test coverage, and scope control.
read_scope: HARBOR-234 spec and Work Item boundaries
delegations.write_ownership_note: read-only review lane; no files were written by the delegate
delegations.output_format: Findings first with file/line references, then validation results, risks, and whether scope was exceeded.
delegations.finding: HTTP write-precheck endpoint allowed caller-supplied page/target facts to become provided-context evidence.
delegations.resolution: Added session-bound HTTP write-precheck wrapper and regression test proving spoofed URL/title/locator are not emitted in evidence provenance.
delegations.summary: Delegate output was integrated by routing HTTP write-precheck through getSessionWritePrecheckFacts, adding spoofing regression coverage, and recording the finding/resolution in HARBOR-234 progress and build evidence.

delegation_evidence.integration_summary: The read-only review lane did not write files or GitHub state. Main controller integrated the finding into implementation, regression tests, .loom/progress/HARBOR-234.md, and this build evidence.

integration_evidence.summary: HTTP write-precheck facts now use session-bound page facts instead of caller-supplied page URL/title/locator context.
Regression coverage posts spoofed URL/title/locator and verifies spoofed provenance is not emitted.
Subagent finding, integration decision, validation, and no-live-action boundary are recorded in the recovery carrier.

forbidden_targets: provider launch internals outside existing session/snapshot APIs
ownership_constraints.shared_carrier_policy: .loom/status/current.md remains active for HARBOR-234 in the formal worktree. Closeout/retire is out of scope until after merge.

ownership_contract.task_goal: Add Harbor Runtime API projections for site-level resource facts and write-precheck facts so Core can consume Lode Xiaohongshu/BOSS requirements without receiving raw browser material.
read_scope: Harbor runtime API facts, session, snapshot, evidence, write-precheck, tests, and HARBOR-234 carriers
non_goals: No live Xiaohongshu/BOSS account or profile use
No submit, publish, send, save, delete, pay, or risk-control bypass
No hosted browser, marketplace, or bulk collection
ownership_contract.output_format: PR-ready branch with validation evidence and no-live-action boundary.

runtime_boundary.provider_detection: fixture/local-safe validation only in this build evidence

remaining_limitations: This PR does not complete Core task execution, App packaged runtime supervision, or final App Computer Use E2E.
Site login/app readiness facts may be unknown unless a later safe live probe supplies observed refs.
Live Xiaohongshu/BOSS profile and production page validation require explicit user authorization.
